summary: #88868 remains the live canonical issue for the MiniMax M3 pricing and PDF extraction follow-up. #88869 is the same implementation path historically linked to #88868, but it is already closed, unmerged, dirty, and had failed checks/proof blockers, so no close, merge, or fixed-by-candidate action is planned.

actions.reason: #88868 is the only open surviving item and best canonical thread for the root cause; it should stay open for maintainer follow-up because the linked PR is closed and unmerged.
Already-closed refs must not receive closure actions. #88869 remains useful historical evidence and contributor context for #88868, but it is not an active fix candidate.
